Flat concept inventory:
- Paper Structure | papers: a72b8bbd039989db39769da836cdb287737deb92; 9814df8bd00ba999c4d1e305a7e9bca579dc7c75; 55e022fb7581bb9e1fce678d21fb25ffbb3fbb88; 82fdca623c65b6acf6b06bdeed48b2a9ebdb80a9; d4dc1012d780e8e2547237eb5a6dc7b1bf47d2f0; 4d8f2d14af5991d4f0d050d22216825cac3157bd; 4aa6298b606941a282d735fa3143da293199d2ca; a5d10341717c0519cf63151b496a6d2ed67aa05f; 5aec474c31a2f4b74703c6f786c0a8ff85c450da; 2bc1c8bd00bbf7401afcb5460277840fd8bab029; 65a9c7b0800c86a196bc14e7621ff895cc6ab287; 79c93274429d6355959f1e4374c2147bb81ea649; 3f5b31c4f7350dc88002c121aecbdc82f86eb5bb; a3b42a83669998f65df60d7c065a70d07ca95e99; a5036f31f0e629dc661f120b8c3b1f374d479ab8; cf7c2e0e4fb2af689aaf4b7a7cddf7b1f4d5e3f0; 8dbd57469bb32e6d57f23f5e765bf1c9ac8e080c; 0ca79ce151db7cbe745377696aa8789acdb1c3aa; 8bd6a2a89503be083176f2cc26fabedb79238cbd; 268d347e8a55b5eb82fb5e7d2f800e33c75ab18a; 379b4d871cebf431208154adaaff7ea946b2bb38; 0839722fb5369c0abaff8515bfc08299efc790a1; 6f870f7f02a8c59c3e23f407f3ef00dd1dcf8fc4; 616e98ba9e60f36c6ee226cc66c787610f0bbb62; 02251886950770e82b3d68564d60cdfe15e73199; 1bfa62ddfa3f6691e0e40c06f8ead594b6449cfa; 9542cc130dfb70c1614af0d130977b440f26d206; 64caaab51d8339f1b99874d3bddb79debbe661ca; e7d09b6f2bc878cf2c993acf675f409d0b55f35a; ca6a2bc279be5a3349a22bfd6866ed633d18734b; 0b500aa5fcc175f07aecf26c0e8ddc4f0c6a931d; 17c2bb358169541f2d0a769f80779f46d1cd3d37; 7cb09c77aab947c376df4fbcc4f2d877960f35d6; 8e97d6593f63e5d83a14bd234ebd0b95b730fba3; f22d71c7ce9720ba1f717a4f1181488200e78198; b1c037a32ea0cb74232c84fab435d1392ef36f88; cdd9c1d23f9e89d5113f3e31821bb174c6a6afed; df0ddb588a200d095743e9d26fc4a9318619766e; e82dbb208305f1614555342a5dc2231822c9285f; cf3b44d5c0257b9b1ff9ea0c04da307cc426a811; 6d864a6659e2c503cd6d28d05593f0603b9a48bd; eb42cf88027de515750f230b23b1a057dc782108; 39ca8f8ff28cc640e3b41a6bd7814ab85c586504; 5ddb51ae85deca14dc7fc8adc07305c22a1ebe0a; 1ddbd08ad8cf22a5c66c4242194c4286328533bf; a3ca77456142b78367dd5d53138b50dfac8086ca; a091bf215c716a146140f81c751712db628c8e20; ecfff30e570498b6c87c5d1319a0cbcdf7a8b86d; d3f79210b54e168c76b8c311488f42d7d1048b81; 394be105b87e9bfe72c20efe6338de10604e1a11; da4261a957eaa96bf626e9641ef68ebed1d5333f; a7ac99d7cf3f568ab1a741392144b646b856ae0c; f7db2e2b181df60be90fd602b1aa306e4ca8b342; 5e5fbc41106db9acaaf3a365801051e477f0e984; 9fb3070e60e0df8db6b7b1ecdd6e379481e22898; 8e080b98efbe65c02a116439205ca2344b9f7cd4; e5c8960eb2ec034ffbd353ef39fd1cb541d3c7c9; 2fd6f77540c1cc8e70b96208ccf9971b4251fc02; 98e565fa06f6c7bf7c46833b5106b26dc45130c4; 4b8be374f863a47aa11dd8acf1aeed9bf9dda402; daf34122a0c38531aeeb55069ba98e564c263d53; ff5f0c5b6905a8c4b361a625b450e9ab417fa854; 2d9310132cfe9046f4b61f6e90a5ef92c6e0ba71; bf40c9e7832e1b2887cbf5798455f91705ea11ba; 8f3138f7ee5127faab265793be8ae278bc49d9b1; e3fd89a7f6b28973cfc68bfc51caebd8fb93f0bc; c9dbdae8146b9f97e254f5d26fd6efde96eaa703; cd2d1a0f73ba8c40f882a386cd367899785fb877; f4793adffd6f67ffcb93ccfc5672ab301b8a2b96; 89a816719613e220a64ab2590c938c23bbfe187e; 3d29ce781f297dc543e44dfb39990baff3a3acca; 18f9a6045ba01cb079c4fa49a630d71bbd27cd92; 93b6b79b4ef6c345f31722ce7c829385c6dce0d6; b1721374889899950994f67029fe899de257c140; 795f1de72332f2ba6e1d4c6300a586f1232cbe93; 5ba77a5bdeffb62aa0902ae68997bbc38db8a722; 73757c0e4b2f28eaa73ac036694468fd6c811e22; 6bc4b1376ec2812b6d752c4f6bc8d8fd0512db91; edf1252b5d34e416422dd20a5789ddb56971748d; 2c2f4644bf953f56c460e2b8597e86ae47d0af87; e177f4a4b613b56564d0e9c658445c34bf39f5b6; a084474eab8710655da1a9f17e5d74d24ce6fba1; 338d8f3b199abcebc85f34016b0162ab3a9d5310; 8e5d42f5b98146d0784fe85e29c768a4989e1478; 49ee175d5901febdf0463829d78a810a7090ae46; 84fddc4f323ceda856057127e9a0727543ae58fd; fc4c380102d6f72657d1ab54dffd6be536bb01c7; 24aa57dae649b6683d8f5bc8deaf2ff549cdacc4; baa1dc079d98ca76b0173c8d653fed759fd0a371; 477da0209e093448a8370862540182a1a77602fe; b1ef91c5541f88297c7551e1adf15fcee7987197; bf2f223b2f4c425275f6b31f9e0111af32b41882; 3a88020d756662b36d5c406a0e78a5082302f4e0; 860b223f97b4c0e6eaa42d6be1184c97055fd848; 569e323c84bcc01fc6562ea2c7084c7a2a00e703; e435d753bf39b6d6632b553282fff091d7942316; de41158515fa7260a0983e787650884a98eed811; 88659a25acb87f61fe5e3139ffe7786477955a4e; b400f3f61eab83a6e667ac4b7b4ce5b804a34d35; cd012a00cf0f0f07170538e3f89732f65cb8df07; fc9a9ef7e3e2b3ad26f041f0bc0b756e209b5cb1; 7bf93d409033b67c349f840b94966a546253b85b; 262337c19641ba3ec30821ed628c9e4b981e4bc4; 88601c22bb7176e8b6f1d351c79a1ed1fa6c1584; a2539713a31ee08cc8116c1355da9f96896df145; - Development Process | papers: a72b8bbd039989db39769da836cdb287737deb92; 9814df8bd00ba999c4d1e305a7e9bca579dc7c75; 55e022fb7581bb9e1fce678d21fb25ffbb3fbb88; 82fdca623c65b6acf6b06bdeed48b2a9ebdb80a9; d4dc1012d780e8e2547237eb5a6dc7b1bf47d2f0; 4d8f2d14af5991d4f0d050d22216825cac3157bd; 4aa6298b606941a282d735fa3143da293199d2ca; a5d10341717c0519cf63151b496a6d2ed67aa05f; 5aec474c31a2f4b74703c6f786c0a8ff85c450da; 2bc1c8bd00bbf7401afcb5460277840fd8bab029; 65a9c7b0800c86a196bc14e7621ff895cc6ab287; 79c93274429d6355959f1e4374c2147bb81ea649; 3f5b31c4f7350dc88002c121aecbdc82f86eb5bb; a3b42a83669998f65df60d7c065a70d07ca95e99; a5036f31f0e629dc661f120b8c3b1f374d479ab8; cf7c2e0e4fb2af689aaf4b7a7cddf7b1f4d5e3f0; 8dbd57469bb32e6d57f23f5e765bf1c9ac8e080c; 0ca79ce151db7cbe745377696aa8789acdb1c3aa; 8bd6a2a89503be083176f2cc26fabedb79238cbd; 268d347e8a55b5eb82fb5e7d2f800e33c75ab18a; 379b4d871cebf431208154adaaff7ea946b2bb38; 0839722fb5369c0abaff8515bfc08299efc790a1; 6f870f7f02a8c59c3e23f407f3ef00dd1dcf8fc4; 616e98ba9e60f36c6ee226cc66c787610f0bbb62; 02251886950770e82b3d68564d60cdfe15e73199; 1bfa62ddfa3f6691e0e40c06f8ead594b6449cfa; 9542cc130dfb70c1614af0d130977b440f26d206; 64caaab51d8339f1b99874d3bddb79debbe661ca; e7d09b6f2bc878cf2c993acf675f409d0b55f35a; ca6a2bc279be5a3349a22bfd6866ed633d18734b; 0b500aa5fcc175f07aecf26c0e8ddc4f0c6a931d; 17c2bb358169541f2d0a769f80779f46d1cd3d37; 7cb09c77aab947c376df4fbcc4f2d877960f35d6; 8e97d6593f63e5d83a14bd234ebd0b95b730fba3; f22d71c7ce9720ba1f717a4f1181488200e78198; b1c037a32ea0cb74232c84fab435d1392ef36f88; cdd9c1d23f9e89d5113f3e31821bb174c6a6afed; df0ddb588a200d095743e9d26fc4a9318619766e; e82dbb208305f1614555342a5dc2231822c9285f
- Technical Evolution | papers: a72b8bbd039989db39769da836cdb287737deb92; 9814df8bd00ba999c4d1e305a7e9bca579dc7c75; 55e022fb7581bb9e1fce678d21fb25ffbb3fbb88; 82fdca623c65b6acf6b06bdeed48b2a9ebdb80a9; d4dc1012d780e8e2547237eb5a6dc7b1bf47d2f0; 4d8f2d14af5991d4f0d050d22216825cac3157bd; 4aa6298b606941a282d735fa3143da293199d2ca; a5d10341717c0519cf63151b496a6d2ed67aa05f; 5aec474c31a2f4b74703c6f786c0a8ff85c450da; 2bc1c8bd00bbf7401afcb5460277840fd8bab029; 65a9c7b0800c86a196bc14e7621ff895cc6ab287; 79c93274429d6355959f1e4374c2147bb81ea649; 3f5b31c4f7350dc88002c121aecbdc82f86eb5bb; a3b42a83669998f65df60d7c065a70d07ca95e99; a5036f31f0e629dc661f120b8c3b1f374d479ab8; cf7c2e0e4fb2af689aaf4b7a7cddf7b1f4d5e3f0; 8dbd57469bb32e6d57f23f5e765bf1c9ac8e080c; 0ca79ce151db7cbe745377696aa8789acdb1c3aa; 8bd6a2a89503be083176f2cc26fabedb79238cbd; 268d347e8a55b5eb82fb5e7d2f800e33c75ab18a; 379b4d871cebf431208154adaaff7ea946b2bb38; 0839722fb5369c0abaff8515bfc08299efc790a1; 6f870f7f02a8c59c3e23f407f3ef00dd1dcf8fc4; 616e98ba9e60f36c6ee226cc66c787610f0bbb62; 02251886950770e82b3d68564d60cdfe15e73199; 1bfa62ddfa3f6691e0e40c06f8ead594b6449cfa; 9542cc130dfb70c1614af0d130977b440f26d206; 64caaab51d8339f1b99874d3bddb79debbe661ca; e7d09b6f2bc878cf2c993acf675f409d0b55f35a; ca6a2bc279be5a3349a22bfd6866ed633d18734b

- Recent Image-text Multimodal Models | papers: 3f5b31c4f7350dc88002c121aecbdc82f86eb5bb; a3b42a83669998f65df60d7c065a70d07ca95e99; a5036f31f0e629dc661f120b8c3b1f374d479ab8; cf7c2e0e4fb2af689aaf4b7a7cddf7b1f4d5e3f0; 8dbd57469bb32e6d57f23f5e765bf1c9ac8e080c; 0ca79ce151db7cbe745377696aa8789acdb1c3aa; 8bd6a2a89503be083176f2cc26fabedb79238cbd; 268d347e8a55b5eb82fb5e7d2f800e33c75ab18a; 379b4d871cebf431208154adaaff7ea946b2bb38; 0839722fb5369c0abaff8515bfc08299efc790a1; 6f870f7f02a8c59c3e23f407f3ef00dd1dcf8fc4; 616e98ba9e60f36c6ee226cc66c787610f0bbb62; 02251886950770e82b3d68564d60cdfe15e73199; 1bfa62ddfa3f6691e0e40c06f8ead594b6449cfa; 9542cc130dfb70c1614af0d130977b440f26d206; 64caaab51d8339f1b99874d3bddb79debbe661ca; e7d09b6f2bc878cf2c993acf675f409d0b55f35a; ca6a2bc279be5a3349a22bfd6866ed633d18734b
- Evolution of Application Technology | papers: 0b500aa5fcc175f07aecf26c0e8ddc4f0c6a931d; 17c2bb358169541f2d0a769f80779f46d1cd3d37; 7cb09c77aab947c376df4fbcc4f2d877960f35d6; 8e97d6593f63e5d83a14bd234ebd0b95b730fba3; f22d71c7ce9720ba1f717a4f1181488200e78198; b1c037a32ea0cb74232c84fab435d1392ef36f88; cdd9c1d23f9e89d5113f3e31821bb174c6a6afed; df0ddb588a200d095743e9d26fc4a9318619766e; e82dbb208305f1614555342a5dc2231822c9285f

- Recent Image-text Multimodal Models | papers: 7cb09c77aab947c376df4fbcc4f2d877960f35d6; 8e97d6593f63e5d83a14bd234ebd0b95b730fba3; f22d71c7ce9720ba1f717a4f1181488200e78198; b1c037a32ea0cb74232c84fab435d1392ef36f88; cdd9c1d23f9e89d5113f3e31821bb174c6a6afed; df0ddb588a200d095743e9d26fc4a9318619766e; e82dbb208305f1614555342a5dc2231822c9285f
- Applications of multimodal Models in Image-Text Tasks | papers: cf3b44d5c0257b9b1ff9ea0c04da307cc426a811; 6d864a6659e2c503cd6d28d05593f0603b9a48bd; eb42cf88027de515750f230b23b1a057dc782108; 39ca8f8ff28cc640e3b41a6bd7814ab85c586504; a3b42a83669998f65df60d7c065a70d07ca95e99; 5ddb51ae85deca14dc7fc8adc07305c22a1ebe0a; 1ddbd08ad8cf22a5c66c4242194c4286328533bf; a3ca77456142b78367dd5d53138b50dfac8086ca; a091bf215c716a146140f81c751712db628c8e20; 0839722fb5369c0abaff8515bfc08299efc790a1; 3f5b31c4f7350dc88002c121aecbdc82f86eb5bb; ecfff30e570498b6c87c5d1319a0cbcdf7a8b86d; 6f870f7f02a8c59c3e23f407f3ef00dd1dcf8fc4; d3f79210b54e168c76b8c311488f42d7d1048b81; ca6a2bc279be5a3349a22bfd6866ed633d18734b; 394be105b87e9bfe72c20efe6338de10604e1a11; da4261a957eaa96bf626e9641ef68ebed1d5333f; a7ac99d7cf3f568ab1a741392144b646b856ae0c; f7db2e2b181df60be90fd602b1aa306e4ca8b342; 5e5fbc41106db9acaaf3a365801051e477f0e984; 9fb3070e60e0df8db6b7b1ecdd6e379481e22898; 8e080b98efbe65c02a116439205ca2344b9f7cd4; e5c8960eb2ec034ffbd353ef39fd1cb541d3c7c9; 2fd6f77540c1cc8e70b96208ccf9971b4251fc02; 98e565fa06f6c7bf7c46833b5106b26dc45130c4; 4b8be374f863a47aa11dd8acf1aeed9bf9dda402; daf34122a0c38531aeeb55069ba98e564c263d53; ff5f0c5b6905a8c4b361a625b450e9ab417fa854; 2d9310132cfe9046f4b61f6e90a5ef92c6e0ba71; f22d71c7ce9720ba1f717a4f1181488200e78198; bf40c9e7832e1b2887cbf5798455f91705ea11ba; 8f3138f7ee5127faab265793be8ae278bc49d9b1; e3fd89a7f6b28973cfc68bfc51caebd8fb93f0bc; c9dbdae8146b9f97e254f5d26fd6efde96eaa703; cd2d1a0f73ba8c40f882a386cd367899785fb877; f4793adffd6f67ffcb93ccfc5672ab301b8a2b96; 89a816719613e220a64ab2590c938c23bbfe187e; 3d29ce781f297dc543e44dfb39990baff3a3acca; 18f9a6045ba01cb079c4fa49a630d71bbd27cd92; 93b6b79b4ef6c345f31722ce7c829385c6dce0d6; b1721374889899950994f67029fe899de257c140; 795f1de72332f2ba6e1d4c6300a586f1232cbe93; 5ba77a5bdeffb62aa0902ae68997bbc38db8a722; df0ddb588a200d095743e9d26fc4a9318619766e; 73757c0e4b2f28eaa73ac036694468fd6c811e22

- Generic Model | papers: a3b42a83669998f65df60d7c065a70d07ca95e99; 5ddb51ae85deca14dc7fc8adc07305c22a1ebe0a; 1ddbd08ad8cf22a5c66c4242194c4286328533bf; a3ca77456142b78367dd5d53138b50dfac8086ca; a091bf215c716a146140f81c751712db628c8e20; 0839722fb5369c0abaff8515bfc08299efc790a1; 3f5b31c4f7350dc88002c121aecbdc82f86eb5bb; ecfff30e570498b6c87c5d1319a0cbcdf7a8b86d; 6f870f7f02a8c59c3e23f407f3ef00dd1dcf8fc4; d3f79210b54e168c76b8c311488f42d7d1048b81; ca6a2bc279be5a3349a22bfd6866ed633d18734b; 394be105b87e9bfe72c20efe6338de10604e1a11; da4261a957eaa96bf626e9641ef68ebed1d5333f; a7ac99d7cf3f568ab1a741392144b646b856ae0c; f7db2e2b181df60be90fd602b1aa306e4ca8b342; 5e5fbc41106db9acaaf3a365801051e477f0e984; 9fb3070e60e0df8db6b7b1ecdd6e379481e22898; 8e080b98efbe65c02a116439205ca2344b9f7cd4; e5c8960eb2ec034ffbd353ef39fd1cb541d3c7c9; 2fd6f77540c1cc8e70b96208ccf9971b4251fc02; 98e565fa06f6c7bf7c46833b5106b26dc45130c4; 4b8be374f863a47aa11dd8acf1aeed9bf9dda402
- model architecture | papers: a3b42a83669998f65df60d7c065a70d07ca95e99; 5ddb51ae85deca14dc7fc8adc07305c22a1ebe0a; 1ddbd08ad8cf22a5c66c4242194c4286328533bf; a3ca77456142b78367dd5d53138b50dfac8086ca; a091bf215c716a146140f81c751712db628c8e20; 0839722fb5369c0abaff8515bfc08299efc790a1; 3f5b31c4f7350dc88002c121aecbdc82f86eb5bb; ecfff30e570498b6c87c5d1319a0cbcdf7a8b86d; 6f870f7f02a8c59c3e23f407f3ef00dd1dcf8fc4; d3f79210b54e168c76b8c311488f42d7d1048b81; ca6a2bc279be5a3349a22bfd6866ed633d18734b
- data | papers: 394be105b87e9bfe72c20efe6338de10604e1a11; da4261a957eaa96bf626e9641ef68ebed1d5333f; a7ac99d7cf3f568ab1a741392144b646b856ae0c; f7db2e2b181df60be90fd602b1aa306e4ca8b342; 5e5fbc41106db9acaaf3a365801051e477f0e984; 9fb3070e60e0df8db6b7b1ecdd6e379481e22898; 8e080b98efbe65c02a116439205ca2344b9f7cd4; e5c8960eb2ec034ffbd353ef39fd1cb541d3c7c9; 2fd6f77540c1cc8e70b96208ccf9971b4251fc02; 98e565fa06f6c7bf7c46833b5106b26dc45130c4; 4b8be374f863a47aa11dd8acf1aeed9bf9dda402
- Biomedical Model | papers: daf34122a0c38531aeeb55069ba98e564c263d53; ff5f0c5b6905a8c4b361a625b450e9ab417fa854; 2d9310132cfe9046f4b61f6e90a5ef92c6e0ba71; f22d71c7ce9720ba1f717a4f1181488200e78198; bf40c9e7832e1b2887cbf5798455f91705ea11ba; 8f3138f7ee5127faab265793be8ae278bc49d9b1; e3fd89a7f6b28973cfc68bfc51caebd8fb93f0bc; c9dbdae8146b9f97e254f5d26fd6efde96eaa703; cd2d1a0f73ba8c40f882a386cd367899785fb877; f4793adffd6f67ffcb93ccfc5672ab301b8a2b96; 89a816719613e220a64ab2590c938c23bbfe187e; 3d29ce781f297dc543e44dfb39990baff3a3acca; 18f9a6045ba01cb079c4fa49a630d71bbd27cd92; 93b6b79b4ef6c345f31722ce7c829385c6dce0d6; b1721374889899950994f67029fe899de257c140; 795f1de72332f2ba6e1d4c6300a586f1232cbe93; 5ba77a5bdeffb62aa0902ae68997bbc38db8a722; df0ddb588a200d095743e9d26fc4a9318619766e; 73757c0e4b2f28eaa73ac036694468fd6c811e22
- model architecture | papers: daf34122a0c38531aeeb55069ba98e564c263d53; ff5f0c5b6905a8c4b361a625b450e9ab417fa854; 2d9310132cfe9046f4b61f6e90a5ef92c6e0ba71; f22d71c7ce9720ba1f717a4f1181488200e78198; bf40c9e7832e1b2887cbf5798455f91705ea11ba; 8f3138f7ee5127faab265793be8ae278bc49d9b1; e3fd89a7f6b28973cfc68bfc51caebd8fb93f0bc; c9dbdae8146b9f97e254f5d26fd6efde96eaa703; cd2d1a0f73ba8c40f882a386cd367899785fb877; f4793adffd6f67ffcb93ccfc5672ab301b8a2b96
- data | papers: 89a816719613e220a64ab2590c938c23bbfe187e; 3d29ce781f297dc543e44dfb39990baff3a3acca; 18f9a6045ba01cb079c4fa49a630d71bbd27cd92; 8f3138f7ee5127faab265793be8ae278bc49d9b1; 93b6b79b4ef6c345f31722ce7c829385c6dce0d6; b1721374889899950994f67029fe899de257c140; 795f1de72332f2ba6e1d4c6300a586f1232cbe93; 5ba77a5bdeffb62aa0902ae68997bbc38db8a722; df0ddb588a200d095743e9d26fc4a9318619766e; 73757c0e4b2f28eaa73ac036694468fd6c811e22
- Challenges and future directions of multimodal models in image-text tasks | papers: 6bc4b1376ec2812b6d752c4f6bc8d8fd0512db91; edf1252b5d34e416422dd20a5789ddb56971748d; 2c2f4644bf953f56c460e2b8597e86ae47d0af87; e177f4a4b613b56564d0e9c658445c34bf39f5b6; a084474eab8710655da1a9f17e5d74d24ce6fba1; 338d8f3b199abcebc85f34016b0162ab3a9d5310; 8e5d42f5b98146d0784fe85e29c768a4989e1478; 49ee175d5901febdf0463829d78a810a7090ae46; 84fddc4f323ceda856057127e9a0727543ae58fd; fc4c380102d6f72657d1ab54dffd6be536bb01c7; 24aa57dae649b6683d8f5bc8deaf2ff549cdacc4; baa1dc079d98ca76b0173c8d653fed759fd0a371; 477da0209e093448a8370862540182a1a77602fe; b1ef91c5541f88297c7551e1adf15fcee7987197; bf2f223b2f4c425275f6b31f9e0111af32b41882; 3a88020d756662b36d5c406a0e78a5082302f4e0; 860b223f97b4c0e6eaa42d6be1184c97055fd848; 569e323c84bcc01fc6562ea2c7084c7a2a00e703; e435d753bf39b6d6632b553282fff091d7942316; de41158515fa7260a0983e787650884a98eed811; 88659a25acb87f61fe5e3139ffe7786477955a4e; b400f3f61eab83a6e667ac4b7b4ce5b804a34d35; cd012a00cf0f0f07170538e3f89732f65cb8df07; fc9a9ef7e3e2b3ad26f041f0bc0b756e209b5cb1; 7bf93d409033b67c349f840b94966a546253b85b; 262337c19641ba3ec30821ed628c9e4b981e4bc4; 88601c22bb7176e8b6f1d351c79a1ed1fa6c1584; a2539713a31ee08cc8116c1355da9f96896df145; 95a48aa25a6f735df13b3c63ba36ad1bb983972e; 635290858e4ece0ca019bb439e353e8deec18d14; 7caaafd5a3ee033c98e792c7ea5b699d005753d5; 741c7e78d0bd101b1fbf39d0c47fc519941bd275; a13a38d457ee73efc0a6011370346df0bec2d1b3; 2b8c2c708500a6603f039a76a9c843f7fddf4225; 389fb015d72bbad3dc127093faef1a1fdebfc7b1

- Intrinsic Factor | papers: 8e5d42f5b98146d0784fe85e29c768a4989e1478; 49ee175d5901febdf0463829d78a810a7090ae46; 84fddc4f323ceda856057127e9a0727543ae58fd; fc4c380102d6f72657d1ab54dffd6be536bb01c7; 24aa57dae649b6683d8f5bc8deaf2ff549cdacc4; baa1dc079d98ca76b0173c8d653fed759fd0a371; 477da0209e093448a8370862540182a1a77602fe; b1ef91c5541f88297c7551e1adf15fcee7987197; bf2f223b2f4c425275f6b31f9e0111af32b41882; 3a88020d756662b36d5c406a0e78a5082302f4e0; 860b223f97b4c0e6eaa42d6be1184c97055fd848; 569e323c84bcc01fc6562ea2c7084c7a2a00e703; e435d753bf39b6d6632b553282fff091d7942316; de41158515fa7260a0983e787650884a98eed811; 88659a25acb87f61fe5e3139ffe7786477955a4e; b400f3f61eab83a6e667ac4b7b4ce5b804a34d35; cd012a00cf0f0f07170538e3f89732f65cb8df07; fc9a9ef7e3e2b3ad26f041f0bc0b756e209b5cb1; 7bf93d409033b67c349f840b94966a546253b85b; 262337c19641ba3ec30821ed628c9e4b981e4bc4; 88601c22bb7176e8b6f1d351c79a1ed1fa6c1584; a2539713a31ee08cc8116c1355da9f96896df145; 95a48aa25a6f735df13b3c63ba36ad1bb983972e; 635290858e4ece0ca019bb439e353e8deec18d14; 7caaafd5a3ee033c98e792c7ea5b699d005753d5; 741c7e78d0bd101b1fbf39d0c47fc519941bd275; a13a38d457ee73efc0a6011370346df0bec2d1b3; 2b8c2c708500a6603f039a76a9c843f7fddf4225; 389fb015d72bbad3dc127093faef1a1fdebfc7b1
